channel.title: YouTube on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in YouTube on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Deleted Channel Content
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to show you some deleted content from this channel.

item.title: Channel Second Anniversary!
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about this Channel’s second anniversary.

item.title: Channel Analytics (August 2024)
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Channel analytics.

item.title: This Channel And The Game Industry
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about this Channel and the game industry, kind of a meta video, a video about my videos, kind of to put in perspective like what

item.title: Effect Of This Channel On Me
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the effect of this channel on me.

item.title: Channel Memberships
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Channel memberships.

item.title: My 100k Award
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me Tim, well, this thing just [Music].

item.title: Why Aren't There More Channels Like This?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about why there aren’t more game developers doing channels like this.

item.title: Making A YouTube Channel, Part 2
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim, and this is part two of making a YouTube channel.

item.title: Making A YouTube Channel
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to digress from Game Dev and just talk a little bit about what

item.title: A Quick Note on Ads
item.description: So I just found out that some people are seeing ads in my videos. I did not think that ads would show up in unmonetized videos, but apparently they can be inserted. So what I’ve done is I turned on monetization, and immediately made all the ad skippable, and got rid of what are called mid-roll ads, which are ones that can show up in the middle of my videos. That’s the best I can do, except if I make videos that are, at least, it said, longer than eight minutes, but I tried it with some of my eight minute eight and a half minutes and it didn’t work. So it looks like it’s nine minutes or longer.

item.title: Introduction to "Cain on Games"!
item.description: Hi there, my name is Timothy Kane and I’ve been a professional game developer for more than 40 years. Back in the 80s, I made a game called Grand Slam bridge and most recently I made an RPG called The Outer Worlds. In between, I made a lot of other games.
